title: MTR Foods Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: MTR Foods Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MTR Foods Capital India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!
